duplicates.reason: Belgium Defence 780 trailers in 6 types - same authority, similar quantities (780 vs 778), different dates suggest same procurement
Belgium Defence 99 tractors + 94 semitrailers - identical specs, same authority, different tender stages

Italy multifunctional engineer equipment and lighting towers - identical quantities (30+62), same specs
Romania field kitchen assemblies - same authority UM 01020, 6 units, same supplier STIMPEX

false_positives.reason: Primarily tractors and garden machinery procurement, trailers are minor component
Primarily UTV quad bikes procurement, transport trailers are accessory
Primarily Light Tactical ATVs (4 units), only 2 tipping trailers as accessories
Primarily All-Terrain Vehicles (52 units), only 20 cargo trailers as accessories
Primarily militarized motorcycles in 3 categories, platform trailers are transport accessories

category_errors.reason: Title specifically states 'tanker semitrailer' not just tank trailer
Contains 6 different trailer types including special purpose (tipping) and container transport
Two-part procurement with both civilian and military off-road variants
Includes trucks, containers, and trailers - not just loading systems
Container trailer plus 7 roll-off containers - mixed procurement
Three lots with different trailer types including special purpose (boat, tipper) not just cargo
Contains both heavy duty trailers and semi-trailers in different weight classes
High, medium and small capacity trailers likely different types not all cargo

coverage_gaps: Artillery ammunition trailers - underrepresented despite being critical military asset
Eastern European countries (Poland, Romania, Bulgaria) have fewer high-value procurements
Naval-specific trailers (torpedo, sonar equipment) missing from dataset
Air defense system trailers (PATRIOT mentioned but limited coverage)
CBRN decontamination trailers limited to one Swedish tender
Command post trailers limited coverage despite operational importance
Bridge laying equipment trailers only from Sweden
Electronic warfare equipment trailers not represented
Arctic/extreme cold weather trailers limited to climate chambers

summary.notes: Dataset has good coverage of Western European procurement but shows systematic duplication issues (17 duplicate pairs), categorization errors (10 entries), and missing quantity data (10 entries). Eastern Europe and specialized trailer types are underrepresented. Recommend deduplication process and enhanced extraction rules for quantities from descriptions.
